title: Find Kth Character in Expanded String
titleCn: 在展开字符串中查找第 K 个字符

detail.title: Find Kth Character in Expanded String
hints: Use the index of a character in the word to calculate how many times it is repeated in t.
Reduce k by that repetition count as you iterate through the characters.
Handle spaces as single characters (cost 1) and reset the index counter for each new word.
